overall.description: A static shot of a dimly lit medieval circular stone room with warm firelight illuminating the space. The scene appears to be from a video game engine, featuring a stove with glowing embers on the left, a doorway leading to another room in the center, and a workbench on the right. Red banners hang from the upper walls creating a cozy, atmospheric interior.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a dimly lit medieval stone room. A warm glow emanates from the iron stove on the left, while an open doorway in the center reveals another room beyond. To the right, a wooden workbench holds various items under a small lamp. Red banners hang from the curved stone walls, creating an atmospheric, cozy interior scene with no visible movement or characters present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze within a dimly lit medieval stone room that remains frozen in a state of quiet warmth. It begins by capturing the soft, orange glow emanating from an iron stove on the left, which casts flickering light across the curved masonry. As the eye drifts toward the center, the view opens through a doorway that reveals the shadowed depths of an adjacent chamber. The scene then shifts its focus to the right, where a wooden workbench sits illuminated by a small lamp, before settling on the red banners draped from the upper walls to complete the cozy, still interior.
